programme.title: ⚠️ 4.8m @ 16s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
